import math

def add_matrices(A, B):
    n = len(A)
    m = len(A[0])
    C = [[0 for _ in range(m)] for _ in range(n)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            C[i][j] = A[i][j] + B[i][j]
    return C

def sub_matrices(A, B):
    n = len(A)
    m = len(A[0])
    C = [[0 for _ in range(m)] for _ in range(n)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            C[i][j] = A[i][j] - B[i][j]
    return C

def get_next_power_of_2(n):
    return 2**math.ceil(math.log2(n)) if n > 0 else 1

def pad_matrix(matrix, target_dim):
    rows = len(matrix)
    cols = len(matrix[0])
    padded_matrix = [[0 for _ in range(target_dim)] for _ in range(target_dim)]
    for i in range(rows):
        for j in range(cols):
            padded_matrix[i][j] = matrix[i][j]
    return padded_matrix

def unpad_matrix(padded_matrix, original_rows, original_cols):
    unpadded_matrix = [[0 for _ in range(original_cols)] for _ in range(original_rows)]
    for i in range(original_rows):
        for j in range(original_cols):
            unpadded_matrix[i][j] = padded_matrix[i][j]
    return unpadded_matrix

def split_matrix(matrix):
    n = len(matrix)
    half = n // 2
    A11 = [[0 for _ in range(half)] for _ in range(half)]
    A12 = [[0 for _ in range(half)] for _ in range(half)]
    A21 = [[0 for _ in range(half)] for _ in range(half)]
    A22 = [[0 for _ in range(half)] for _ in range(half)]

    for i in range(half):
        for j in range(half):
            A11[i][j] = matrix[i][j]
            A12[i][j] = matrix[i][j + half]
            A21[i][j] = matrix[i + half][j]
            A22[i][j] = matrix[i + half][j + half]
    return A11, A12, A21, A22

def join_matrices(A11, A12, A21, A22):
    half = len(A11)
    n = 2 * half
    matrix = [[0 for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(n)]
    for i in range(half):
        for j in range(half):
            matrix[i][j] = A11[i][j]
            matrix[i][j + half] = A12[i][j]
            matrix[i + half][j] = A21[i][j]
            matrix[i + half][j + half] = A22[i][j]
    return matrix

def strassen_multiply(A, B):
    r1, c1 = len(A), len(A[0])
    r2, c2 = len(B), len(B[0])

    if c1 != r2:
        raise ValueError("Matrix dimensions are not compatible for multiplication.")

    max_dim = max(r1, c1, r2, c2)
    target_dim = get_next_power_of_2(max_dim)

    padded_A = pad_matrix(A, target_dim)
    padded_B = pad_matrix(B, target_dim)

    result_padded = _strassen_recursive(padded_A, padded_B)

    final_result = unpad_matrix(result_padded, r1, c2)
    return final_result

def _strassen_recursive(A, B):
    n = len(A)

    if n == 1:
        return [[A[0][0] * B[0][0]]]

    A11, A12, A21, A22 = split_matrix(A)
    B11, B12, B21, B22 = split_matrix(B)

    P1 = _strassen_recursive(add_matrices(A11, A22), add_matrices(B11, B22))
    P2 = _strassen_recursive(add_matrices(A21, A22), B11)
    P3 = _strassen_recursive(A11, sub_matrices(B12, B22))
    P4 = _strassen_recursive(A22, sub_matrices(B21, B11))
    P5 = _strassen_recursive(add_matrices(A11, A12), B22)
    P6 = _strassen_recursive(sub_matrices(A21, A11), add_matrices(B11, B12))
    P7 = _strassen_recursive(sub_matrices(A12, A22), add_matrices(B21, B22))

    C11 = add_matrices(sub_matrices(add_matrices(P1, P4), P5), P7)
    C12 = add_matrices(P3, P5)
    C21 = add_matrices(P2, P4)
    C22 = add_matrices(sub_matrices(add_matrices(P1, P3), P2), P6)

    return join_matrices(C11, C12, C21, C22)
